name: chemtradeasia-mdm-seller
title: MDM Seller
description: Seller-facing MDM features: manage your own SDS / TDS / MSDS documents, with room for future MDM seller tools.

mdmApiEndpoint.title: MDM API Endpoint
mdmApiEndpoint.description: Base URL of the MDM API (e.g. https://tradeasia.exchange/api/v1)

mdmUsername.title: MDM Username
mdmUsername.description: MDM login used to obtain a bearer token. A seller-scoped alternative token was tried and dropped — every MDM API call is already scoped by an explicit vtex_seller_id/external_reference_id parameter, so a separate token added no isolation and was a source of bugs (see node/handlers/devSettingsHandler.ts).

stripeSecretKey.title: Stripe Secret Key
stripeSecretKey.description: Server-side Stripe API secret key (sk_test_... or sk_live_...). Required for the Subscription page's real checkout (MDM-plan-backed) and the standalone Embed Demo page.

stripePublishableKey.title: Stripe Publishable Key
stripePublishableKey.description: Client-side Stripe key (pk_test_... or pk_live_...), used to mount Stripe's Payment Element. Required for the Subscription page's real checkout and for Embed Demo.

stripeWebhookSecret.title: Stripe Webhook Signing Secret
stripeWebhookSecret.description: Signing secret (whsec_...) for the Stripe webhook endpoint pointed at /_v/mdm-seller/subscription/webhook. Used to verify incoming events.

stripeMonthlyAmountUsd.title: Monthly Plan Price (USD) — Embed Demo only
stripeMonthlyAmountUsd.description: Amount charged per month on the standalone Embed Demo page only. Defaults to 25 if not set. The real Subscription page prices plans from MDM directly and ignores this.

stripeYearlyAmountUsd.title: Yearly Plan Price (USD) — Embed Demo only
stripeYearlyAmountUsd.description: Amount charged per year on the standalone Embed Demo page only. Defaults to 250 if not set. The real Subscription page prices plans from MDM directly and ignores this.
